initial_draft:
<my name> BLUE </my name>
<MOVE> 1 / 4 </MOVE>
<my resources> Dollars: 0 </my resources>
<reason> I have no resources to trade, so I must either accept or reject the proposal. Since Player RED is offering me nothing, I have no incentive to accept. I will reject the proposal. </reason>
<player answer> REJECT </player answer>
<message> I cannot accept this trade as it gives me nothing. I will reject it. </message>
<newly proposed trade> NONE </newly proposed trade>

iterations.feedback:
<critique>
1. Format: OK. The response contains all required tags in the correct order, and the content is parseable.

2. Payoff alignment: OK. Given that Player BLUE has no resources and is offered nothing, rejecting is the only logical move. There is no alternative split that would be more beneficial in this case.

3. Opponent plausibility: OK. Since Player BLUE has no resources and is offered nothing, rejecting the trade is the only logical move. There is no way to make this proposal more plausible without giving Player BLUE something in return.

4. Consistency: OK. The <reason>, <player answer>, and <message> are all consistent with each other. The message does not contradict the action taken.

5. Rule compliance: OK. The move is within the allowed number of moves for Player BLUE, and the rules are respected by rejecting the proposal.
</critique>
